title: Watercolor Quotes
excerpt: First posted these on Instagram , and I hope to do similar things maybe even weekly in 2015. There will likely be a mix of aspiration thrown in with some snark, because as it turns out, that's really what people…
body: First posted these on Instagram, and I hope to do similar things maybe even weekly in 2015. There will likely be a mix of aspiration thrown in with some snark, because as it turns out, that's really what people like. Isn't it? Would love to include your favorite quotes... do share in the comments!
